landing.title: Smart Adaptive Recovery System
landing.subtitle: Automated incident detection and recovery solution for Viettel Post
landing.proactiveDesc: Automatically identifies parcels stuck at sorting hubs before customers complain.
landing.adaptiveDesc: Tailors the recovery process based on the customer profile and parcel category.
landing.realtimeDesc: Customers receive instant alerts and full transparency over the investigation.
landing.trackingFeatureDesc: Follow a shipment from creation to delivery and view its live timeline.
landing.helpFeatureDesc: Read policy guidance, FAQs, and recovery instructions in both languages.
landing.adminFeatureDesc: Review case volume, abnormal events, and customer impact at a glance.

tracking.title: Shipment Tracking
tracking.subtitle: Watch the parcel progress and open the recovery flow if an abnormal delay is detected.
tracking.currentRouteDesc: The parcel is currently held at the sorting hub while the system monitors for abnormal delay.
tracking.abnormalDesc: The parcel remained at the current stage for {{minutes}} minutes.

recovery.title: Recovery Center
recovery.subtitle: The system is coordinating the recovery workflow for the affected shipment.
recovery.estimatedResolutionDesc: The investigation is expected to conclude within {{hours}} hours.
recovery.recommendedActionDesc: Continue investigation to preserve the shipment while the warehouse checks the latest scan logs.
recovery.bestFit: Best fit based on the current profile
recovery.canSelect: Customer can select this option if preferred

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Customers can review policy, recovery instructions, and FAQ content in Vietnamese or English.
help.faqDesc: Find quick answers to common questions about shipping and recovery services.
help.guideDesc: Detailed guides about recovery process and compensation.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Monitor parcel health, recovery workload, and customer impact from one place.
admin.compensationDesc: Total compensation value currently outstanding is {{amount}} VND.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: View your shipment overview, recovery cases, and notifications.

notifications.title: Notification Center
notifications.subtitle: View all notifications and updates about your shipments.
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You'll receive notifications when there are updates about your shipments.

create.title: Create Demo Shipment
create.subtitle: Simulate a parcel flow and trigger the adaptive recovery experience.
create.instantTrackingDesc: A demo shipment is generated with a tracking ID that can be followed.
create.autoRecoveryDesc: If the parcel stalls long enough, the system creates a recovery case.
create.recoveryOptionsDesc: Customers can continue investigation, request refund, or choose replacement.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Viettel Post - Smart Adaptive Recovery System Demo.
